# CLARA Reviews AI Assistant — Test Cases for Review Approver Persona

**Source Document**: BRD - CLARA Reviews AI Assistant
**Persona**: Review Approver (Second in approval chain — L7+ manager)
**Date Generated**: June 2, 2026
**Generated by**: pm-builder-agent

---

## Persona Context

**Role**: Reviews and approves/rejects submitted reviews. Exercises judgment on completeness, accuracy, and compliance. Responsible for maintaining oversight rigor while meeting SLA targets.

**Key Pain Points**:
- 20-30 minutes per review to make a decision
- Difficulty deciphering reviewer intent from responses
- Hunting for context across multiple systems
- Inconsistent rejection comment formatting

**CLARA Value Proposition**:
- One-page AI summaries at top of review
- Risk flags highlighting items needing attention
- Fast-track recommendations for clean reviews
- Structured rejection drafting assistance

---

## Test Suite 1: Approval Queue (Epic-9 — Queue Prioritization)

### TC-APR-001: Queue displays triaged list with visual indicators
**Priority**: P0
**Precondition**: Approver has 5+ reviews pending approval in their queue

| Step | Action | Expected Result |
|------|--------|-----------------|
| 1 | Log in as approver and navigate to approval queue | Queue loads within 3 seconds |
| 2 | Observe queue ordering | Reviews sorted by composite priority score (due date urgency + risk level) |
| 3 | Verify visual indicators | Each review shows: status badge (urgent/normal), due date, submission date, reviewer name |
| 4 | Check "fast-track" vs "deeper examination" flags | Clean reviews marked for fast-track; reviews with risk flags marked for deeper examination |

### TC-APR-002: Queue distinguishes overdue reviews
**Priority**: P0
**Precondition**: At least 1 review has passed its SLA deadline

| Step | Action | Expected Result |
|------|--------|-----------------|
| 1 | Open approval queue | Overdue reviews appear at top with red urgency indicator |
| 2 | Verify SLA breach indicator | Review shows "SLA Breached" or equivalent warning badge |
| 3 | Check sort order | Overdue reviews sorted above all non-overdue items regardless of other factors |

### TC-APR-003: Queue shows reviews with risk flags elevated
**Priority**: P0
**Precondition**: Mix of clean reviews and reviews with unresolved violations

| Step | Action | Expected Result |
|------|--------|-----------------|
| 1 | Open approval queue | Reviews with risk flags appear before reviews without flags (among same urgency tier) |
| 2 | Verify risk indicator visibility | Risk icon/badge visible without opening the review |
| 3 | Check flag count | Badge shows count of risk items (e.g., "2 issues") |

---

## Test Suite 2: One-Page AI Summary (Epic-6.1)

### TC-APR-004: Summary auto-generates on review open
**Priority**: P0
**Precondition**: A review has been submitted for approval

| Step | Action | Expected Result |
|------|--------|-----------------|
| 1 | Open a submitted review from approval queue | Page loads with AI summary at top within 3 seconds |
| 2 | Verify summary position | Summary panel displayed at the very top of the review page, before review questions |
| 3 | Verify summary is expanded by default | Summary content visible without clicking to expand |
| 4 | Verify collapsible behavior | Clicking collapse control hides the summary; clicking again expands it |

### TC-APR-005: Summary displays qualitative readiness status (Green)
**Priority**: P0
**Precondition**: Review with all questions answered, no violations, evidence complete

| Step | Action | Expected Result |
|------|--------|-----------------|
| 1 | Open a clean, well-completed review | Readiness status shows GREEN with label "Excellent - Ready for approval" |
| 2 | Verify no numeric score displayed | Only qualitative color + label visible; NO numeric percentage shown to approver |
| 3 | Verify color coding range | Green = 90-100 internal score (approver doesn't see number) |

### TC-APR-006: Summary displays qualitative readiness status (Yellow)
**Priority**: P0
**Precondition**: Review with some gaps (missing evidence, vague responses)

| Step | Action | Expected Result |
|------|--------|-----------------|
| 1 | Open a review with quality issues | Readiness status shows YELLOW with label "Fair - Review carefully" |
| 2 | Verify items needing attention are listed below status | Specific issues enumerated (e.g., "Vague response to Q5", "Missing evidence for monitoring") |

### TC-APR-007: Summary displays qualitative readiness status (Red)
**Priority**: P0
**Precondition**: Review with critical gaps (ineffective control, multiple missing items)

| Step | Action | Expected Result |
|------|--------|-----------------|
| 1 | Open a problematic review | Readiness status shows RED with label "Needs attention" |
| 2 | Verify critical items highlighted | Critical issues listed with severity indicator |

### TC-APR-008: Summary shows key assertions
**Priority**: P0
**Precondition**: Review submitted with various responses

| Step | Action | Expected Result |
|------|--------|-----------------|
| 1 | Open submitted review | Summary contains 5-7 key assertions in plain language |
| 2 | Verify assertion content | Each assertion summarizes a reviewer's response (e.g., "Application details confirmed accurate", "All production targets registered for monitoring") |
| 3 | Verify assertions are linkable | Clicking an assertion scrolls to the relevant review question |

### TC-APR-009: Summary shows variance vs. last quarter
**Priority**: P0
**Precondition**: Review for entity that had changes since last quarter

| Step | Action | Expected Result |
|------|--------|-----------------|
| 1 | Open review with detected changes | Summary includes "Changes since last quarter" section |
| 2 | Verify +/- indicators | Changes show delta format (e.g., "Control count: 12→14 (+2)") |
| 3 | Verify unchanged items noted | Summary confirms "No material changes" for unchanged properties |

### TC-APR-010: Summary shows evidence status
**Priority**: P0
**Precondition**: Review with evidence attachments

| Step | Action | Expected Result |
|------|--------|-----------------|
| 1 | Open review with evidence | Summary shows evidence count and validation status |
| 2 | Verify validated links | Shows "3 screenshots, 2 document links (all validated accessible) ✓" or equivalent |
| 3 | If broken links exist | Shows warning with broken link count |

---

## Test Suite 3: Risk Flags (Epic-6.2)

### TC-APR-011: Risk flags displayed when issues exist
**Priority**: P0
**Precondition**: Review with unresolved violations and vague responses

| Step | Action | Expected Result |
|------|--------|-----------------|
| 1 | Open review with issues | "Items Requiring Attention" section appears in summary |
| 2 | Verify severity classification | Each flag marked as CRITICAL, WARNING, or INFO |
| 3 | Verify flag content examples | Shows specific issues: unresolved violations (with count and type), vague responses (with question reference), missing evidence |
| 4 | Verify historical context | Includes: last review date, rejection rate for this reviewer, average approval time |

### TC-APR-012: No risk flags for clean reviews
**Priority**: P0
**Precondition**: Review with all quality criteria met

| Step | Action | Expected Result |
|------|--------|-----------------|
| 1 | Open a perfectly clean review | Shows "No issues detected" or equivalent positive message |
| 2 | Verify no false warnings | No WARNING or CRITICAL flags on a genuinely clean review |

### TC-APR-013: Risk flag - unresolved violations detected
**Priority**: P0
**Precondition**: Review for entity with open GRC-Next violations

| Step | Action | Expected Result |
|------|--------|-----------------|
| 1 | Open review with open violations | Risk flag shows: "CRITICAL - X unresolved Sev-N violations (type)" |
| 2 | Verify violation details | Shows violation type (Deployment Monitoring V2, FIMv4), severity, count |
| 3 | Verify link to detail | Flag provides link to view violations in GRC-Next/Delta |

### TC-APR-014: Risk flag - vague or incomplete responses
**Priority**: P0
**Precondition**: Review where one response says "Reviewed evidence" with no specifics

| Step | Action | Expected Result |
|------|--------|-----------------|
| 1 | Open review with vague response | Risk flag shows: "WARNING - Response to Q[X] lacks specifics" |
| 2 | Verify specific guidance | Flag explains what's missing (e.g., "no evidence counts mentioned") |

### TC-APR-015: Risk flag - reviewer transition detected
**Priority**: P1
**Precondition**: Review where current reviewer differs from all prior reviews

| Step | Action | Expected Result |
|------|--------|-----------------|
| 1 | Open review from new reviewer | Info flag notes "New reviewer - all 5 prior reviews completed by [previous reviewer]" |
| 2 | Verify it's INFO not CRITICAL | Reviewer change is informational, not blocking |

---

## Test Suite 4: Fast-Track Approval (Epic-6.3)

### TC-APR-016: Fast-track recommended for clean reviews
**Priority**: P0
**Precondition**: Review with quality score >90, no risk flags, clean history

| Step | Action | Expected Result |
|------|--------|-----------------|
| 1 | Open qualifying review | "Fast-Track Approval Recommended" banner displayed |
| 2 | Verify one-click approve | [Approve Now] button visible and enabled |
| 3 | Click [Approve Now] | Review approved; concise approval note auto-logged for audit trail |
| 4 | Verify approval note | Auto-generated note includes: review passed quality checks, no issues detected, approved per SLA |

### TC-APR-017: Fast-track NOT recommended when risk flags present
**Priority**: P0
**Precondition**: Review with quality issues

| Step | Action | Expected Result |
|------|--------|-----------------|
| 1 | Open review with risk flags | "Detailed Review Recommended" message shown instead of fast-track |
| 2 | Verify [Approve Now] not shown | No fast-track button; standard approve/reject workflow displayed |
| 3 | Verify explanation | Message explains why detailed review is needed (references specific flags) |

### TC-APR-018: Fast-track NOT recommended when prior rejections exist
**Priority**: P0
**Precondition**: Review that was previously rejected and resubmitted

| Step | Action | Expected Result |
|------|--------|-----------------|
| 1 | Open resubmitted review | Fast-track not recommended even if current quality is high |
| 2 | Verify history flag | Summary notes "Previously rejected (X times)" in historical context |

---

## Test Suite 5: Structured Rejection (Epic-6 — Approver Decision Support)

### TC-APR-019: CLARA drafts structured rejection when issues detected
**Priority**: P0
**Precondition**: Review with legitimate issues requiring rejection

| Step | Action | Expected Result |
|------|--------|-----------------|
| 1 | Click "Reject" on a review with issues | CLARA drafts a structured rejection comment |
| 2 | Verify rejection structure | Draft includes: (a) specific issues found, (b) required remediation steps, (c) timeline expectations |
| 3 | Verify approver can edit | Draft is editable before submission |
| 4 | Submit rejection | Rejection comment saved; review status changes to "Rejected" |

### TC-APR-020: Rejection includes remediation steps
**Priority**: P0
**Precondition**: Approver rejects for missing evidence

| Step | Action | Expected Result |
|------|--------|-----------------|
| 1 | Reject review citing missing evidence | CLARA-drafted rejection includes specific fix instructions |
| 2 | Verify actionability | Each rejection point has: what's wrong, what to do, how to verify it's fixed |
| 3 | Verify reviewer will see checklist | Confirm rejection translates to actionable checklist for reviewer (Epic-5 integration) |

### TC-APR-021: Approver can reject without CLARA assistance
**Priority**: P0
**Precondition**: Approver wants to write custom rejection

| Step | Action | Expected Result |
|------|--------|-----------------|
| 1 | Click "Reject" | Both "Use CLARA draft" and "Write my own" options available |
| 2 | Select "Write my own" | Free-text rejection comment field available |
| 3 | Submit custom rejection | Custom comment saved; review rejected successfully |

---

## Test Suite 6: AI Governance for Approver View (Epic-11)

### TC-APR-022: AI summary visible ONLY in Submitted/Under Approval state
**Priority**: P0
**Precondition**: Review in "Submitted" state

| Step | Action | Expected Result |
|------|--------|-----------------|
| 1 | Open review in "Submitted" state | AI summary, risk flags, and fast-track recommendation visible |
| 2 | Approve the review | Review moves to "Final Approved" state |
| 3 | Re-open the now-approved review | AI summary, risk flags, and recommendations NO LONGER VISIBLE |
| 4 | Verify clean view | Only human-authored review responses visible; zero AI content |

### TC-APR-023: AI content not visible in auditor walkthrough view
**Priority**: P0
**Precondition**: Approved review; auditor access enabled

| Step | Action | Expected Result |
|------|--------|-----------------|
| 1 | Access review in auditor view / walkthrough mode | Zero AI content visible |
| 2 | Check for AI markers | No "CLARA suggested", no "AI-generated", no summary panel |
| 3 | Verify clean responses | Only human-authored text in all response fields |

### TC-APR-024: AI content absent from exported evidence packages
**Priority**: P0
**Precondition**: Approved review; export requested

| Step | Action | Expected Result |
|------|--------|-----------------|
| 1 | Export evidence package (PDF/Excel) | Export completes without AI content |
| 2 | Search exported document for AI markers | Zero instances of "CLARA", "AI-generated", "suggestion", or recommendation markers |
| 3 | Verify only human-authored content | All responses in export are the final reviewer-submitted text only |

### TC-APR-025: AI metadata logged internally only
**Priority**: P0
**Precondition**: Approver uses AI summary to make decision

| Step | Action | Expected Result |
|------|--------|-----------------|
| 1 | Approver opens review, reads AI summary | AI interaction logged internally (FinTech audit log) |
| 2 | Check PAC audit log | NO AI metadata in the customer/auditor-facing PAC audit log |
| 3 | Verify internal FinTech log | Contains: who accessed AI summary, when, what action taken |

---

## Test Suite 7: Performance Requirements

### TC-APR-026: Summary generation within SLA
**Priority**: P0
**Precondition**: Review submitted for approval

| Step | Action | Expected Result |
|------|--------|-----------------|
| 1 | Open review as approver | Summary generates in <3 seconds |
| 2 | Measure time from page load to summary render | Meets 90th percentile target of <3 seconds |

### TC-APR-027: Queue loads within acceptable time
**Priority**: P0
**Precondition**: Approver has 20+ reviews in queue

| Step | Action | Expected Result |
|------|--------|-----------------|
| 1 | Navigate to approval queue | Queue renders with all items in <3 seconds |
| 2 | Verify all visual indicators load | Priority badges, due dates, and risk flags all rendered |

---

## Test Suite 8: Graceful Degradation

### TC-APR-028: Review accessible when CLARA unavailable
**Priority**: P0
**Precondition**: CLARA/Bedrock service is down

| Step | Action | Expected Result |
|------|--------|-----------------|
| 1 | Open review when CLARA is unavailable | Review loads successfully without AI summary |
| 2 | Verify no errors | No error messages block the page; graceful "AI summary unavailable" note or simply hidden |
| 3 | Verify approve/reject still works | Standard approval workflow functions without CLARA |
| 4 | Verify no fast-track recommendation | Fast-track disabled when CLARA cannot assess quality |

### TC-APR-029: Partial AI failure handled gracefully
**Priority**: P1
**Precondition**: CLARA can generate summary but evidence validation API is down

| Step | Action | Expected Result |
|------|--------|-----------------|
| 1 | Open review with partial AI availability | Summary generates with available data |
| 2 | Check evidence section | Shows "Unable to verify evidence links — check manually" instead of validated/broken status |
| 3 | Verify partial results clearly marked | Disclaimer on any section with incomplete data |

---

## Test Suite 9: Edge Cases

### TC-APR-030: First review for a new control (no historical data)
**Priority**: P1
**Precondition**: Control has never been reviewed before

| Step | Action | Expected Result |
|------|--------|-----------------|
| 1 | Open review with no prior history | Summary acknowledges "First review — no historical comparison available" |
| 2 | Verify no false variance flags | No "changes detected" based on missing prior data |
| 3 | Verify fast-track still possible | If all quality criteria met, fast-track can still be recommended |

### TC-APR-031: Review with maximum number of questions (13+)
**Priority**: P1
**Precondition**: Review type with all questions including IPA (13 questions)

| Step | Action | Expected Result |
|------|--------|-----------------|
| 1 | Open full 13-question review | Summary adequately covers all sections without truncation |
| 2 | Verify assertions cover IPA section | Key assertions reference IPA status if relevant |

### TC-APR-032: Concurrent approval attempts
**Priority**: P1
**Precondition**: Two approvers open the same review simultaneously (if workflow allows)

| Step | Action | Expected Result |
|------|--------|-----------------|
| 1 | Approver A opens review | Summary generates normally |
| 2 | Approver B opens same review | Summary generates normally (independent sessions) |
| 3 | Approver A approves | Review status changes; Approver B sees updated state on refresh |

### TC-APR-033: Review with Design Effectiveness = No (trigger for auto-notification)
**Priority**: P0
**Precondition**: Review where reviewer marked Design Effectiveness "No"

| Step | Action | Expected Result |
|------|--------|-----------------|
| 1 | Open review with effectiveness failure | CRITICAL risk flag prominently displayed |
| 2 | Verify Controllership notification reference | Summary notes that GRC Task will be/was created for Controllership Contact |
| 3 | Approve or reject | Regardless of decision, auto-notification to Controllership proceeds (Epic-7 integration) |

---

## Test Suite 10: Counter-Metric Monitoring

### TC-APR-034: Fast-track doesn't reduce review quality
**Priority**: P1
**Precondition**: Approver uses fast-track on 10+ reviews over a quarter

| Step | Action | Expected Result |
|------|--------|-----------------|
| 1 | Track fast-tracked reviews over quarter | Post-approval audit deficiency rate does not increase vs. baseline |
| 2 | Compare with manually-approved reviews | Fast-track reviews have equivalent or better audit outcomes |

### TC-APR-035: AI summary doesn't create over-reliance
**Priority**: P1
**Precondition**: Monitor approver behavior over multiple reviews

| Step | Action | Expected Result |
|------|--------|-----------------|
| 1 | Track approver decisions vs. CLARA recommendations | Approver occasionally overrides CLARA (doesn't blindly follow) |
| 2 | Verify rejection rate doesn't drop below baseline | Approvers still reject when warranted despite fast-track suggestions |
| 3 | Flag if fast-track acceptance >95% | Alert if approver appears to be rubber-stamping without judgment |
